title: Orbitbound
hypothesis: A small set of concentric movement lanes, with readable radial hops that briefly clear danger, will add platform-like spatial clarity and expressive evasion to automatic horde combat without becoming a side-scrolling platformer.
preserve: primitive grayscale visuals with one accent

provenance.report: Tests whether orbiting on four concentric rings and making deliberate inward/outward hops creates the clear, expressive dodge decisions associated with platform traversal while preserving a top-down survivor arena. Pickups and timed milestones increase volley width and fire rate without interrupting play.
